creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
This patch updates security/vlock from v2.1 to v2.2.1. It supersedes ports/122049 which can now be closed.

The only difference between v2.2 and 2.2.1 is that the patch sumbitted as a followup in ports/122049 (patch-script.c) has been integrated upstream.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
